creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192280
[NEW PORT] sysutils/intel-pcm-devel: Process Count Monitor (PCM) for Intel processors, r466636

It's the -devel version of 'sysutils/intel-pcm'; patch is still needed.

Took the time to correct 2 warning messages in both ports:

  WARN: Makefile: [14]: the arguments to ONLY_FOR_ARCHS are not sorted.  Please consider sorting them.
  WARN: Makefile: "ONLY_FOR_ARCHS" has to appear earlier.

KR,
Vinícius
